subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of J.C. André Lehoux of the city of Hearst, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
